input: We're launching a SaaS project management tool. Our costs are $8/user/month. Competitors charge $10-$30/user/month. We want to target SMBs. What should we price at?
Our enterprise plan is $500/month but only 5% of users upgrade from the $50/month plan. Should we add a middle tier?
We're considering a 20% price increase. Model the impact on churn, revenue, and margin at different elasticity levels.
Compare freemium vs. free trial vs. money-back guarantee pricing models for a consumer fitness app with 50K MAU.
Our competitor just dropped their price by 30%. How should we respond? Our product is positioned as premium.
